text.title: Agentic Experimentation Loop
text.summary: Full agent pipeline from hypothesis intake to learning extraction, model-cost tiering, and critical gotchas for LLM-driven experimentation.

section.title: Agent Pipeline
section.p: Intake: hypothesis-author (sonnet) → experiment-doc.md + JSON spec. Pre-flight: sample-size-calculator (haiku) + guardrail-mapper (sonnet). Launch: flag-deployer (haiku, gated). Monitor: srm-watcher (haiku, hourly) + metric-watcher (haiku, daily). Readout: analyst-agent (opus). Library: learning-extractor (opus, weekly). Governance: metric-registry-keeper (sonnet).

rule.statement: Use cheap models (haiku) for collection, hourly checks, and flag operations. Use sonnet for structured authoring. Reserve opus for synthesis and decision recommendations. Never run opus on hourly SRM checks.
rule.rationale: Opus on hourly SRM watch burns 10x tokens for a chi-square computation haiku handles deterministically. Model-cost tiering applies throughout the pipeline.

example.code: <role>You are the {agent}. Experimentation at scale (Kohavi/Tang/Xu).</role> <inputs> <experiment_id>{exp_yyyy-NN-slug}</experiment_id> <doc>{path to experiment-doc.md}</doc> <metrics>{path to metric-catalog.yaml}</metrics> <data>{warehouse SQL or vendor API result}</data> <prior>{related experiments registry slice}</prior> </inputs> <rules> - Never declare a winner without: lift, CI, p-value, pre-registered primary metric, SRM passed. - Surface novelty risk if runtime < 14 days or primary metric is engagement. - Reject solution-shaped hypotheses. Require: if X then metric M moves by delta. - Never compute on >1 primary metric without Bonferroni correction. - Output JSON to schema {schema_path}; markdown digest <= 80 lines. - Flag interference risk (marketplace, social, viral) and block decision if cluster randomization is required but unavailable. </rules> <task>{cadence-specific instruction}</task>

antipattern.description: Agent paraphrasing confidence intervals as "95% chance of winning."
antipattern.reason: That is a Bayesian posterior, not a frequentist CI. Force the agent to copy vendor-emitted statistics verbatim; never let it re-state them in its own words.

antipattern.description: Hypothesis-author producing "we should redesign onboarding" instead of a behavioral prediction.
antipattern.reason: Solution-shaped hypotheses cannot be falsified. Constrain to Hypothesis-If-Then-Because schema with a numeric MDE field.

antipattern.description: Metric-watcher posting "trending positive" messages that humans interpret as ship signals.
antipattern.reason: Label every non-decisional daily update explicitly: "Non-decisional; sequential testing not enabled. Minimum runtime not reached." Prevents premature ships.

antipattern.description: Learning-extractor emitting a learning bullet from a single null result.
antipattern.reason: Require N >= 5 closed experiments sharing a theme before emitting a learning bullet. Single results are evidence, not learnings.

antipattern.description: API keys for LaunchDarkly/Statsig inlined in the model context.
antipattern.reason: Route credentials through the host environment, never into the model context window. Credentials in context leak to logs, caches, and prompt libraries.

antipattern.description: Flag-deployer creating duplicate experiments on retry.
antipattern.reason: Require an idempotency key (hash of experiment-id) on every vendor API call. Retries without idempotency keys create double-counted exposure events.

text.reference: SRM gate that must pass before analyst-agent runs
